title: Once Upon a Time Vikram Song Lyrics
stanzas:
once upon a time
there lived a ghost
he is known to be the killer
and feared the most.

the eagle is coming
you better start running
his blood is rushing
stunning and gunning

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song narrates a thrilling tale of a ghost known as the killer, creating an atmosphere of suspense and excitement.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song serves as a theme that enhances the adventurous and eerie elements of the film's storyline.

Who is the singer and lyricist of the song?

The song is sung by Anirudh and the lyrics are penned by Heisenberg.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 16, 2022.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Once Upon a Time Vikram' encapsulates a thrilling narrative filled with suspense and excitement. It portrays a ghostly figure that instills fear, complemented by Anirudh's energetic vocals. The lyrics evoke a sense of urgency and adventure, making it a captivating listen. This track is perfect for those who enjoy high-energy music that sets a dramatic tone.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Once Upon a Time Vikram Song Lyrics is a thrilling anthem that captures the essence of adventure and suspense. With Anirudh's dynamic vocals and the intriguing lyrics by Heisenberg, this song sets the perfect tone for excitement. Dive into a world where ghosts and eagles collide, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil cinema!
